name: domain-restructure
description: Autonomous structural refactor that reshapes a codebase from layer-first (top-level controllers/services/models) into feature-first screaming architecture (modules/<domain>/<layer>). Applies strategic DDD only: discovers bounded contexts, names them with the ubiquitous language, classifies core/supporting/generic subdomains, then relocates files and rewrites imports with zero functional change. Runs a 6-phase Workflow inside a dedicated worktree, ending in a single green commit.
